# SwiftAISDK documentation

SwiftAISDK is a SwiftPM port of the provider-facing Vercel AI SDK.

## LLM-readable pages
- [Introduction](/llms/index.txt): Learn what SwiftAISDK is and where to start.
- [Components](/llms/components.txt): Generated component map for SwiftAISDK public APIs.
- [Audio](/llms/components/audio.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for audio.
- [Chat and UI messages](/llms/components/chat-and-ui-messages.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for chat and ui messages.
- [Core runtime](/llms/components/core-runtime.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for core runtime.
- [Errors](/llms/components/errors.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for errors.
- [MCP](/llms/components/mcp.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for mcp.
- [Media](/llms/components/media.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for media.
- [Middleware](/llms/components/middleware.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for middleware.
- [Provider models](/llms/components/provider-models.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for provider models.
- [Providers](/llms/components/providers.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for providers.
- [Structured output](/llms/components/structured-output.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for structured output.
- [Telemetry](/llms/components/telemetry.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for telemetry.
- [Tools](/llms/components/tools.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for tools.
- [Video and reranking](/llms/components/video-and-reranking.txt): Public SwiftAISDK APIs for video and reranking.
- [MCP tools](/llms/cookbook/mcp-tools.txt): Discover MCP tools and pass them to a language model.
- [Dubbing](/llms/core/dubbing.txt): Create and inspect provider dubbing jobs.
- [Embeddings](/llms/core/embeddings.txt): Convert text into vectors for search, clustering, and retrieval.
- [Error handling](/llms/core/error-handling.txt): Handle validation, provider, retry, timeout, abort, and output errors.
- [Generate audio](/llms/core/generate-audio.txt): Generate provider audio that is not speech.
- [Generate image](/llms/core/generate-image.txt): Create or edit images with an image model.
- [Generate speech](/llms/core/generate-speech.txt): Convert text into audio with a speech model.
- [Generate text](/llms/core/generate-text.txt): Use a language model for one-shot text generation.
- [Generate video](/llms/core/generate-video.txt): Create video clips with a video model.
- [Rerank](/llms/core/rerank.txt): Score and reorder documents for a query.
- [Stream text](/llms/core/stream-text.txt): Consume language model output as an async sequence.
- [Structured output](/llms/core/structured-output.txt): Generate Decodable Swift values from JSON output.
- [Telemetry](/llms/core/telemetry.txt): Record provider calls, retries, streams, tool execution, usage, and metadata.
- [Tools](/llms/core/tools.txt): Let a language model call typed Swift tools.
- [Transcribe audio](/llms/core/transcribe.txt): Convert audio bytes into text with a transcription model.
- [Transform audio](/llms/core/transform-audio.txt): Transform existing audio through provider-native audio tools.
- [Install](/llms/getting-started/install.txt): Add SwiftAISDK to a SwiftPM package and configure credentials.
- [Quickstart](/llms/getting-started/quickstart.txt): Generate text with a provider and model.
- [Provider matrix](/llms/providers.txt): Generated provider capability overview for SwiftAISDK.
- ["alibaba"](/llms/providers/alibaba.txt): "alibaba provider capabilities and factories."
- ["amazon-bedrock.anthropic"](/llms/providers/amazon-bedrock-anthropic.txt): "amazon-bedrock.anthropic provider capabilities and factories."
- ["amazon-bedrock"](/llms/providers/amazon-bedrock.txt): "amazon-bedrock provider capabilities and factories."

- ["openai"](/llms/providers/openai.txt): "openai provider capabilities and factories."

- ["prodia"](/llms/providers/prodia.txt): "prodia provider capabilities and factories."

- [Public symbols](/llms/reference/generated/public-symbols.txt): Generated public SwiftAISDK symbol table.
- [Troubleshooting](/llms/troubleshooting.txt): Diagnose common SwiftAISDK setup and runtime issues.
